'''Ovise V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ovise system/Legends|Ovise system]] of the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]]. A [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] and a known source of [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas, Ovise V was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by several inhabited [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Midakos]] and [[Midakinos]].

{{Planet-stub}}
